items.name_en: 【Rosalie Wallet】 m12220 Monogram Red m12239 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa)
items.name_cn:
【Rosalie Wallet】 m12220 Monogram Red m12239 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa)
This Rosalie wallet features the classic Monogram canvas from the Candy Factory collection, placing the brand mascot inside a heart-shaped candy cane pattern, making it a compact gift for Vivienne fans. Open the Vivienne-shaped button to reveal multiple pockets for safely storing coins, bills, and cards.
Size: 8 x 2.5 x 11 cm
